headline: Cencora to Expand Retina Consultants of America Through Acquisition of EyeSouth Partners’ Retina Business
summary: CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., March 23, 2026--Cencora, Inc. (NYSE: COR) today announced the signing of a definitive agreement to acquire EyeSouth Partners’ retina business for $1.1 billion. Upon completion of the transaction, the affiliated retina physicians of EyeSouth Partners will join Cencora’s Retina Consultants of America ("RCA"), a leading management services organization (MSO).
